message:
🐛 Disable KeepAliveOutlet — fixes sidebar navigation not updating

KeepAliveOutlet caches route elements but doesn't properly swap
them on client-side navigation, causing the Dashboard to remain
visible when clicking other sidebar items. Replace with standard
React Router <Outlet /> until the keep-alive logic is fixed.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch: @@ -27,7 +27,9 @@ import { TourProvider } from '../../hooks/useTour' import { SetupInstructionsDialog } from '../setup/SetupInstructionsDialog' import { InClusterAgentDialog } from '../setup/InClusterAgentDialog' import { AgentSetupDialog } from '../agent/AgentSetupDialog' -import { KeepAliveOutlet } from './KeepAliveOutlet' +import { Outlet } from 'react-router-dom' +// KeepAliveOutlet disabled — breaks client-side navigation (routes don't re-render) +// import { KeepAliveOutlet } from './KeepAliveOutlet' import { PageErrorBoundary } from '../PageErrorBoundary' import { UpdateProgressBanner } from '../updates/UpdateProgressBanner' import { useUpdateProgress } from '../../hooks/useUpdateProgress' @@ -507,7 +509,7 @@ export function Layout({ children }: LayoutProps) { ) : ( - + )}
